events.title: Geo4Dev Summer Workshop Series
events.blurb: A multi-session summer series of hands-on geospatial workshops for development researchers.

events.title: Geo4Dev 2020 Symposium & Workshop
events.blurb: The annual symposium and workshop, held online, bringing together researchers and practitioners working with geospatial data for development.

events.title: Geo4Dev June Summer Workshop
events.blurb: A summer workshop on open geospatial data and analysis methods.

events.title: Geo4Dev Workshop: Crop Yield Mapping Using Satellite Data
events.blurb: A focused, hands-on workshop on estimating crop yields from satellite imagery.

events.title: Geo4Dev DC Workshop: Woody Cover Estimation in Brazil using SAR
events.blurb: A Washington, DC workshop on woody-cover estimation in Brazil using Synthetic Aperture Radar.

events.title: Geo4Dev 2018 Conference
events.blurb: A convening of geospatial experts focused on innovative analysis for disaster and humanitarian response.

events.title: Geo4Dev 2017 Symposium & Workshop
events.blurb: The inaugural Geo4Dev symposium and workshop that launched the annual convening.
